import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(sorted)
    let y = match list.get(sorted, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(tokens)
    let tok = match list.get(tokens, i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < list.len(nums)
    let x = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < list.len(sorted)
    let v = match list.get(sorted, k)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
